_note: Canonical animation-name → sprite map (sponsor-locked naming 2026-05-29). PixelLab does NOT export the semantic animation_name passed at generation; its metadata.json keys by an action-description slug + folder. This file is the authoritative map the webview trigger logic + manifest generator (scripts/build-sprite-manifest.mjs) consume. VALUE FORMAT: a bare folder name `<state_folder>` means that folder holds exactly ONE animation (resolve animations/<sole-slug>/south/frame_*.png — legacy default); a `<state_folder>/<anim_slug>` value names a SPECIFIC animation inside a folder holding MORE THAN ONE. active_work + active_read now SHARE sitting_at_a_desk_fa (same desk posture → no book↔desk flip during active sessions), so both use the folder/slug form. Idle pool = all idle_* (webview picks at random); active_work fires on tool != Read, active_read on tool == Read.
